templates: {name} has served {business} in {town} for {years} years. {pronoun_cap} came here {origin}. {personality_line} {hook}
The church has stood longer than anyone in {town} can remember, and {name} tends it as {pronoun} has tended every posting before. {personality_line} {hook}
{name} requested this posting. Whether it was penance, curiosity, or something else entirely is not spoken of. {personality_line} {hook}
origins: after a long posting in the capital
following a crisis of faith {pronoun} rarely discusses
at the request of the bishop, for reasons unstated
chasing a rumor that turned out to be true
as punishment for something {pronoun} considers unjust

personality_lines.pious: {pronoun_cap} prays at dawn, noon, and dusk without exception and judges no one who doesn't.
personality_lines.cynical: {pronoun_cap} has long suspected that faith and politics share more than the faithful like to admit.
personality_lines.generous: The door to the vestry is never locked, and travelers in need know it.
personality_lines.cautious: {pronoun_cap} chooses words the way a physician doses medicine — carefully, and not more than needed.
personality_lines.curious: {pronoun_pos} study is full of old manuscripts, half of which have nothing to do with scripture.
personality_lines.brave: {pronoun_cap} stood between the town and a levy of soldiers once. The soldiers backed down.
personality_lines.patient: {pronoun_cap} has heard confessions for {years} years. Nothing surprises {pronoun_obj} anymore.
personality_lines.melancholy: There is a grave in the churchyard that {pronoun} tends more carefully than the rest.
personality_lines.ambitious: {pronoun_cap} did not come to this posting to stay in it forever.
personality_lines.loyal: {pronoun_cap} knows every family in the parish, their histories, their griefs.

hooks: A letter arrived last week with no sender named. {pronoun_cap} has read it a dozen times and said nothing to anyone.
One of the old parish records has been tampered with. {pronoun_cap} noticed, but hasn't confronted anyone.
{pronoun_cap} knows something about the founding of {town} that isn't in any public account.
An old acquaintance from {pronoun_pos} previous posting has just arrived in {town}.
The crypt beneath the church has a door that predates the church itself.
